title.en: China AI LLM Guide 2026: DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, GLM Compared

excerpt.en: Independent 2026 guide to China's leading LLMs—match DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, and GLM to your workload with POC checklists, pricing comparison tips, and compliance paths. Public specs only; not vendor endorsement.
excerpt.zh-CN: 独立梳理2026中国AI大模型格局：DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi、GLM按场景怎么选。含POC清单、价格对比维度、出海合规与7天落地步骤。公开规格，非厂商背书。

heading.zh-CN: 本文要点（AI速读版）

paragraphs.en: In 2026, Chinese LLMs are chosen by workload—not a single leaderboard winner. Map code/reasoning, Chinese/multilingual surfaces, ultra-long documents, or enterprise agents first; then validate cost, latency, and compliance. DeepSeek often leads on reasoning value, Qwen on Chinese and cloud integration, Kimi on very long context, GLM on stable tool calling.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 2026年国产大模型已从「追GPT」进入「按场景分工」。选型先看工作负载（代码/长文档/Agent/多语言），再看成本与合规；DeepSeek偏推理性价比，Qwen偏中文与生态，Kimi偏超长上下文，GLM偏企业Agent。文末附7天POC清单。

heading.en: What you really want when searching "China AI LLM"
heading.zh-CN: 你搜「中国AI大模型」真正想解决什么

paragraphs.en: Most searches hide one of four goals: ship an API integration, build an agent with reliable tool calls, process book-length documents, or satisfy data residency for overseas or regulated teams. Rankings rarely answer those directly.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 搜这个词的人，表面在看名单，实际通常在问：接API上线、做Agent、啃长材料，还是满足出海/合规。榜单最爱给「综合第一」，生产环境里综合第一往往等于没有第一——你的负载才是标尺。

paragraphs.en: Swift Horse indexes public specs so you can shortlist before running your own eval. Confirm pricing, rate limits, and regions on each vendor's official site.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Swift Horse 整理公开规格便于缩小候选；签约前请务必在厂商官网核实价格、限流与区域可用性。

heading.zh-CN: 2026格局一张表：主流厂商与适合谁

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek (R1/V3/V4 families) is widely cited for reasoning, coding, and token economics with open-weight options. Qwen3 Max anchors Chinese, multilingual, and Alibaba Cloud–native stacks. Kimi K2 targets ultra-long context for legal and research reading. GLM-5 and GLM-4.x emphasize enterprise agents and structured JSON. ERNIE, Doubao, Spark, and MiniMax matter when you are already tied to Baidu, ByteDance, iFLYTEK, or voice/multimodal products.
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek（R1/V3/V4）公开资料中常见卖点是推理、代码、开源与token成本。Qwen3 Max 主打中文、多语言与阿里云生态。Kimi K2 面向超长上下文（法律/学术/长文阅读）。GLM 系列强调企业Agent与结构化输出。文心、豆包、讯飞、MiniMax 等在你已绑定对应生态时仍有价值。

paragraphs.en: Third-party roundups (e.g. Check.AI, May 2026) place DeepSeek R1, Qwen3 Max, Kimi K2, and GLM-4.6 in the top tier for different axes—treat those figures as signals, not contracts.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 第三方横评（如 Check.AI 2026年5月）常把 DeepSeek R1、Qwen3 Max、Kimi K2、GLM 列入第一梯队，但分属不同维度——请当作信号，不是合同承诺。

heading.en: What to measure beyond public benchmarks
heading.zh-CN: Benchmark之外，生产环境更该看什么

paragraphs.en: HumanEval, SWE-bench, and AIME scores help you shortlist. Before production, run five checks: P95 latency, tool-call success rate (for agents), long-context needle retrieval, cost per completed task, and logging/residency fit.
paragraphs.zh-CN: HumanEval、SWE-bench、AIME 适合缩小候选。上线前建议自测五项：P95延迟、工具调用成功率（Agent必测）、长上下文needle测试、单位任务成本、日志与数据驻留是否符合要求。

paragraphs.en: Do not copy blog conclusions—run 50 fixed prompts from your product on each finalist.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 别直接抄文章结论——用你们产品里的50条固定prompt在各候选模型上跑一遍。

heading.zh-CN: 按场景选型：从负载出发，不从排名出发

paragraphs.en: Code and math-heavy pipelines: DeepSeek is often shortlisted for reasoning-per-dollar and open deployment paths. Chinese or Southeast Asian multilingual products: Qwen3 Max plus Alibaba tooling. Contracts or full books in one pass: Kimi K2's long-context positioning. Internal ERP/IT agents with JSON and tools: GLM series stability matters more than chat polish.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 代码/数学/推理流水线：DeepSeek 常因性价比与开源路径进入短名单。中文或多语言产品：Qwen3 Max 与阿里云栈。单份合同或整本书：Kimi K2 的长上下文是硬差异。对接ERP的内部Agent：GLM 的工具调用与JSON稳定性比聊天体验更重要。

paragraphs.en: Decision flow: define workload → pick two or three vendors → POC on latency/cost/tools → branch on compliance (self-host open weights vs official API vs overseas MaaS).
paragraphs.zh-CN: 决策路径：明确负载 → 筛2–3家 → POC测延迟/成本/工具 → 按合规分叉（开源自托管 / 官方API / 海外MaaS）。

heading.en: Three team patterns that work in practice
heading.zh-CN: 三个真实选型故事

paragraphs.en: Ten-person overseas SaaS (English-first, cost-sensitive): primary DeepSeek API, Qwen for Chinese support pages; POC gates on cost per 1k chats and P95 under 2.5s; compliance via open weights or regional MaaS.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 10人出海SaaS（英文为主、成本敏感）：主力DeepSeek API，中文页用Qwen；POC看千次对话成本与P95<2.5s；合规走开源自托管或区域MaaS。

paragraphs.en: Domestic law firm (80–120 page contracts): Kimi for full-text Q&A, Qwen for bilingual email; POC on clause retrieval accuracy plus 50-question hallucination spot checks.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 国内律所（80–120页合同）：Kimi做全文问答，Qwen做双语邮件；POC看条款定位准确率+50题幻觉抽检。

paragraphs.en: Manufacturing agent on ERP: GLM for tools/JSON, DeepSeek for hard reasoning subtasks; POC requires >95% tool success and auditable logs.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 制造业ERP Agent：GLM负责工具链与JSON，DeepSeek做复杂推理子任务；POC要求工具成功率>95%且日志可审计。

heading.en: How to compare API pricing without surprises
heading.zh-CN: API价格怎么比才不被骗

paragraphs.en: Split input vs output tokens, check long-context surcharges, batch or off-peak discounts, and free-tier cliffs. Example snapshot from Check.AI (May 2026): DeepSeek R1 output about $2.19/M tokens vs Qwen3 Max output about $4.00/M—verify live vendor pages before budgeting.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 分开看输入/输出单价、长上下文加价、批处理/夜间折扣与免费额度陷阱。Check.AI 2026年5月示例：DeepSeek R1 输出约 $2.19/百万token，Qwen3 Max 输出约 $4.00/百万token——预算前请截图官网价目。

heading.zh-CN: 合规与出海：三条路径

paragraphs.en: Path A: vendor official API (fastest integration; review data residency). Path B: self-host open weights (DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM smaller variants) for control. Path C: overseas MaaS (OpenRouter, Together, cloud regions)—often +5–15% cost, fewer cross-border surprises.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 路径A：官方API（接入快，需审数据条款）。路径B：开源自托管（DeepSeek/Qwen/GLM小参数等，数据可控）。路径C：海外MaaS（OpenRouter、Together、云区域节点），价格略高但跨境顾虑更少。

heading.zh-CN: 7天POC：可以直接抄的作业表

paragraphs.en: D1: write three prompt classes and pass/fail criteria. D2: pick two or three models by scenario. D3: run 50-case set; log latency and cost. D4: 100 tool calls if agentic. D5: long-doc needle test if applicable. D6: security/compliance review. D7: Go/No-Go memo with primary and failover model.
paragraphs.zh-CN: D1：写清3类核心prompt与成功标准。D2：按场景筛2–3个候选。D3：跑50条固定测试集，记延迟与成本。D4：Agent场景做100次工具调用压测。D5：长文档needle测试（如适用）。D6：合规/安全评审。D7：出Go/No-Go备忘录，定主备模型。

paragraphs.en: On Swift Horse: browse the model catalog, compare on the services page, refine with scenario matching, then draft prompts—link: swifthorseai.com.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse：浏览模型库 → 对比页横向比较 → 场景匹配缩小范围 → 提示词工具固化模板（swifthorseai.com）。

heading.zh-CN: 常见误区

paragraphs.en: Choosing from leaderboard rank alone; treating a chat demo as agent sign-off; ignoring output-token spend; skipping needle tests on long-context models; treating third-party reviews as vendor SLAs; locking one vendor with no failover.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 只看榜单不做业务prompt测试；把聊天demo当Agent验收；忽略输出token导致月底爆预算；长上下文不做needle测试；把第三方横评当官方承诺；一次锁死厂商没有failover。

question.en: Which major China AI LLMs exist in 2026?

answer.en: DeepSeek, Qwen (Tongyi), Kimi (Moonshot), GLM (Zhipu), ERNIE, Doubao, Spark, MiniMax, and others. Swift Horse lists public specs for side-by-side discovery.
answer.zh-CN: 包括 DeepSeek、Qwen（通义）、Kimi（月之暗面）、GLM（智谱）、文心、豆包、讯飞、MiniMax 等。Swift Horse 模型库提供公开规格索引。

question.en: How do Chinese LLMs compare to ChatGPT?
question.zh-CN: 国产大模型和ChatGPT比怎么样？

answer.en: Chinese models often win on Mandarin quality, pricing, and long context for many workloads; global agent ecosystems and some English frontier tasks still favor leading closed models. POC on your prompts, not nationality.
answer.zh-CN: 中文、价格、长上下文不少场景已具优势；全球Agent生态与部分英文前沿任务闭源仍强。按你的负载POC，别按国籍选。

answer.en: DeepSeek frequently leads SWE-bench/HumanEval-style benchmarks; Qwen Coder is strong for front-end workflows. Run 20 real repo tasks on finalists.
answer.zh-CN: DeepSeek 在 SWE-bench/HumanEval 类评测常靠前；前端场景也有人更偏好 Qwen Coder。用20个真实repo任务自测再定。

answer.en: Pricing shifts with versions and promos; DeepSeek is often the value leader. Compare input/output rates, context surcharges, and batch discounts on official pages.
answer.zh-CN: 价格随版本与促销变动，DeepSeek 常具性价比优势。比较时需看输入/输出单价、长上下文加价与批处理折扣。

answer.en: Yes for several open-weight lines (DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM variants). Flagship closed APIs remain cloud-only. Check license and GPU requirements before committing.
answer.zh-CN: DeepSeek、Qwen、GLM 等提供开源权重或企业私有化选项；闭源旗舰通常仅API。部署前确认license与算力。

title.en: DeepSeek vs Qwen: How to Choose for Production
title.zh-CN: DeepSeek 与 Qwen 怎么选：生产环境选型指南

excerpt.en: A practical comparison of DeepSeek V4 Pro and Qwen3 Max across context, pricing signals, tool calling, and deployment—without replacing official docs or live benchmarks.
excerpt.zh-CN: 从上下文、成本信号、工具调用与部署方式等维度，横向对比 DeepSeek V4 Pro 与 Qwen3 Max，帮你缩小候选范围（不替代官方文档与实测）。

heading.en: Start with the workload, not the leaderboard
heading.zh-CN: 从业务负载出发，而非榜单排名

paragraphs.en: DeepSeek V4 Pro and Qwen3 Max are both strong general-purpose models from leading Chinese labs. For production selection, map your workload first: long-document RAG, agentic tool use, batch summarization, or high-volume chat with tight latency budgets.
paragraphs.zh-CN: DeepSeek V4 Pro 与 Qwen3 Max 均来自头部中国实验室，综合能力突出。生产选型应先看业务形态：长文档 RAG、Agent 工具调用、批量摘要，还是对延迟敏感的高并发对话。

paragraphs.en: Swift Horse indexes public specs so you can compare context windows, modalities, and API formats side by side. Always confirm pricing, rate limits, and regional availability on each vendor's official site before signing contracts.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Swift Horse 整理公开规格，便于横向对照上下文、模态与 API 形态。签约或上线前，请务必在厂商官网核实最新价格、限流与区域可用性。

heading.en: When DeepSeek V4 Pro tends to fit
heading.zh-CN: DeepSeek V4 Pro 更常见的适用场景

paragraphs.en: Teams often shortlist DeepSeek when they need strong reasoning and coding performance at competitive token economics, especially for internal copilots and research-heavy pipelines.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 若团队重视推理与代码能力，并希望在 token 成本上保持竞争力，DeepSeek 常进入短名单，适合内部 Copilot 与偏研究型流水线。

paragraphs.en: If your stack already standardizes on OpenAI-compatible endpoints, check whether your deployment path (cloud API vs private VPC) matches DeepSeek's published integration options.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 若技术栈已统一 OpenAI 兼容接口，需确认云端 API 或私有化部署路径与 DeepSeek 公布的接入方式一致。

heading.en: When Qwen3 Max tends to fit
heading.zh-CN: Qwen3 Max 更常见的适用场景

paragraphs.en: Qwen3 Max is frequently chosen for multilingual product surfaces, Alibaba Cloud–native deployments, and scenarios that benefit from broad modality coverage in the Qwen ecosystem.
paragraphs.zh-CN: Qwen3 Max 常见于多语言产品、阿里云原生部署，以及需要 Qwen 生态多模态能力的场景。

paragraphs.en: For regulated industries, validate data residency, logging, and enterprise support tiers directly with Alibaba Cloud rather than relying on third-party summaries.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 受监管行业应直接向阿里云确认数据驻留、日志与企业支持等级，勿仅依赖第三方摘要。

heading.zh-CN: 在 Swift Horse 上的下一步

paragraphs.en: Add both models to the comparison table, run a scenario match for your use case, then draft prompts with the prompt optimizer. Treat every result as a starting point for your own evaluation harness.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 可将两款模型加入对比表，按场景做匹配参考，再用提示词工具起草模板。所有结果仅作缩小候选的起点，正式决策仍需自建评测。

title.en: Using Swift Horse as a China AI Model Open Index
title.zh-CN: 如何用 Swift Horse 检索中国大模型公开信息

excerpt.en: How researchers and overseas teams can browse, compare, match, and cite China's leading AI models through a structured open index—built for search engines and generative answer systems.
excerpt.zh-CN: 面向海外团队与研究者：如何通过结构化开放索引浏览、对比与引用中国领先大模型，兼顾搜索引擎与生成式回答场景。

heading.zh-CN: 为什么需要开放索引

paragraphs.en: China's AI model landscape evolves quickly. Vendor pages, pricing, and capability claims change week to week. An independent index helps global teams discover models, compare public parameters, and link to authoritative sources without implying official endorsement.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 中国大模型生态迭代极快，官网参数、定价与能力表述每周都可能变化。独立索引帮助全球团队发现模型、对照公开参数并链接权威来源，同时不暗示任何官方背书。

heading.zh-CN: 四个模块，一条工作流

paragraphs.en: Browse the model catalog by vendor or scenario, compare two to three candidates on the services page, refine choices with conversational matching, then optimize prompts for your task. Each step surfaces structured facts suitable for SEO and GEO citations.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 按厂商或场景浏览模型库，在对比页横向比较 2–3 款候选，用对话式匹配缩小范围，再用提示词工具优化任务模板。每一步都输出结构化事实，便于 SEO 与 GEO 引用。

paragraphs.en: Articles on this site extend the index with guides, comparisons, and update notes. Each article links back to live model pages so crawlers and AI systems can reconcile narrative content with canonical specs.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 本站指南栏目补充对比解读与更新说明，并回链至模型详情页，便于爬虫与 AI 系统将叙事内容与规范规格相互印证。

heading.zh-CN: 如何发布新指南

paragraphs.en: Add a new entry to data/articles.json with bilingual title, excerpt, and sections. The site will automatically expose /articles and /articles/[slug] in both locales and include URLs in sitemap.xml.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 在 data/articles.json 新增条目，填写中英文标题、摘要与正文段落即可。站点会自动生成 /articles 列表与 /articles/[slug] 详情，并写入 sitemap.xml。

title.en: Choosing a Chinese LLM for RAG and Long-Context Workloads
title.zh-CN: 长文档 RAG 场景如何选型中国大模型

excerpt.en: A practical framework for overseas teams evaluating DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, and peers for retrieval-augmented generation—context windows, chunking strategy, and API compatibility without vendor hype.
excerpt.zh-CN: 面向海外团队：从上下文长度、分块策略与 API 兼容性出发，评估 DeepSeek、Qwen、GLM 等模型在长文档 RAG 中的适用性，不替代官方文档与实测。

heading.en: Map context needs before comparing models
heading.zh-CN: 先明确上下文需求，再比较模型

paragraphs.en: RAG pipelines fail more often on retrieval quality and chunk design than on raw benchmark scores. Start with your document sizes, update frequency, and whether you need multimodal inputs. Swift Horse lists public context windows and modalities so you can shortlist candidates before running your own eval harness.
paragraphs.zh-CN: RAG 失败往往源于检索与分块设计，而非榜单分数。先明确文档规模、更新频率与是否需多模态输入。Swift Horse 整理公开上下文与模态信息，便于在自建评测前缩小候选。

heading.zh-CN: 全球技术栈的 API 兼容性

paragraphs.en: Many Chinese labs ship OpenAI-compatible endpoints—critical for teams standardizing on LangChain, LlamaIndex, or custom gateways. Confirm base URLs, auth headers, tool-call formats, and streaming behavior in official docs; Swift Horse surfaces format labels but does not guarantee parity with OpenAI.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 多家中国实验室提供 OpenAI 兼容接口，便于接入 LangChain、LlamaIndex 或自建网关。请在官方文档核实 base URL、鉴权、工具调用与流式行为；Swift Horse 仅标注格式类型，不保证与 OpenAI 完全一致。

title.en: Onboarding Overseas Teams to China's AI Model Landscape
title.zh-CN: 海外团队如何快速了解中国大模型生态

excerpt.en: How product and engineering teams outside China can discover vendors, compare public specs, and build evaluation workflows using Swift Horse as a neutral open index on swifthorseai.com.
excerpt.zh-CN: 帮助中国以外的产品与工程团队发现厂商、对照公开规格并建立评测流程，以 Swift Horse（swifthorseai.com）作为中立开放索引。

heading.en: Why a neutral index helps global buyers
heading.zh-CN: 中立索引对海外采购方的价值

paragraphs.en: Vendor marketing and English-language coverage of Chinese LLMs often lag behind releases. An independent index aggregates public parameters, links to official pages, and separates facts from endorsement—useful for procurement, research citations, and generative search answers.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 厂商宣传与英文报道常滞后于模型发布。独立索引聚合公开参数、链接官网并区分事实与背书，便于采购、学术引用与生成式搜索回答。

heading.zh-CN: Swift Horse 推荐工作流

paragraphs.en: Browse by vendor or scenario → compare two or three models on the services page → refine with conversational matching → draft prompts. Default to the English locale (/en) for overseas rollouts; switch to zh-CN when collaborating with local teams.
paragraphs.zh-CN: 按厂商或场景浏览 → 在对比页横向比较 2–3 款 → 对话式匹配缩小范围 → 起草提示词。海外推广默认使用英文版（/en）；与国内团队协作时可切换 zh-CN。
